author: Genshin Impact
text:
Version "Luna VIII" "Sunny Summer Fontinalia" Trailer | Genshin Impact
Version "Song of the Welkin Moon: Scherzo" "Sunny Summer Fontinalia" Trailer | Genshin Impact
From its reflection upon the water, we learn that the new moon has risen. Beneath the early summer night sky, we wander free and unhurried.
There is no need to hurry. Home is the destination we are sure to reach. Until then, let us listen to the songs along the way.

author: Genshin Impact
text:
"The Final Gift" Animated Short | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Sandrone #TheFinalGift
Here lies
Alain Guillotin
Founding Director of the Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering
White Cavalier of Protection
Lord-Artificer

May the waters protect his soul
May he be troubled by suffering no more
May the waters guide his soul
Safely across to the other shore

"Regrettably, there's nothing more to say."
